item.title: A 6-Figure Car Preserved as a Time Capsule
item.description: A rare and valuable classic car remains preserved like a time capsule with original details still intact. What makes untouched classics so desirable?

media:content.media:title: A 6-Figure Car Preserved as a Time Capsule
media:content.media:description: A rare and valuable classic car remains preserved like a time capsule with original details still intact. What makes untouched classics so desirable?

item.title: Experimental 455 Hemi Build
item.description: An experimental engine build combines unique ideas and performance-focused engineering around a 455 Hemi setup. What makes custom engine projects so exciting?

item.title: Classic Car History on Wheels
item.description: A journey through automotive history featuring classic cars that helped shape different eras of design and performance. Which era is your favorite?

item.title: The 1964 Studebaker Wagonaire
item.description: A closer look at the unique 1964 Studebaker Wagonaire and its innovative sliding roof design. Why was this vehicle ahead of its time?

item.title: One-Owner 1970 Chevrolet El Camino
item.description: A well-preserved 1970 Chevrolet El Camino with a one-owner history and classic utility-meets-performance appeal. What makes survivor cars so special?

item.title: Factory Rear Open Roof Station Wagon

item.title: 1968 Ford Mustang GTCS
item.description: Featuring the 1968 Ford Mustang GT/CS, also known as the California Special, blending sporty styling with unique regional flair. What makes the GT/CS stand apart from other Mustangs?

media:content.media:description: Featuring the 1968 Ford Mustang GT/CS, also known as the California Special, blending sporty styling with unique regional flair. What makes the GT/CS stand apart from other Mustangs?
